IBM Maximo Real Estate and Facilities v9.2.0¶

Release Notes¶

New Features¶

  • Promote platform 401814 to stable (#199)
  • Promote platform 401843 to stable (#214)
  • Promote platform 401882 to stable (#220)
  • Promote platform 401919 to dev (#233)
  • Promote platform 401968 to dev (#238)
  • Promote platform 401987 to dev (#242)
  • Promote platform 402033 to dev (#247)
  • Promote platform 402106 to dev (#260)
  • Promote platform 402125 to dev (#262)
  • Promote platform 402185 to dev (#276)
  • Promote platform 402201 to dev (#277)
  • Promote platform 402215 to dev (#278)
  • Promote platform 402236 to dev (#279)
  • Promote platform 402259 to dev (#281)
  • Promote platform 402293 to dev (#283)
  • Promote platform 402311 to dev (#287)
  • Promote platform 402324 to dev (#290)
  • Promote platform 402370 to dev (#291)
  • Promote platform 402395 to dev (#293)
  • Promote platform 402412 to dev (#294)
  • Promote platform 402466 to dev (#296)
  • Promote platform 402490 to dev (#299)
  • Promote platform 402530 to dev (#303)
  • Promote platform 402543 to dev (#304)
  • Promote platform 402572 to dev (#306)
  • Promote platform 402642 to dev (#308)
  • Promote platform 402662 to dev (#311)
  • Promote platform 402732 to dev (#312)
  • Promote platform 402751 to dev (#315)
  • Promote platform 402789 to dev (#317)
  • Promote platform 402816 to dev (#321)
  • Promote platform 402879 to dev (#326)
  • Promote platform 402904 to dev (#328)
  • Promote platform 402918 to dev (#331)
  • Promote platform 402965 to dev (#336)
  • Promote platform 402969 to dev (#337)
  • Promote platform 402989 to dev (#343)
  • Promote platform 403002 to dev (#348)
  • Promote platform 403002 to dev (#350)
  • Promote platform 403018 to dev (#353)
  • Promote platform 403049 to dev (#364)
  • Promote platform 403097 to dev (#374)
  • Promote platform 403228 to dev (#393)
  • Promote platform 403255 to dev (#399)
  • Promote platform 403281 to dev (#401)
  • Promote platform 403298 to dev (#402)
  • Promote platform 403336 to dev (#403)
  • Promote platform 403355 to dev (#407)
  • Promote platform 403373 to dev (#413)
  • Promote platform 403437 to dev (#440)
  • Promote platform 403465 to dev (#450)
  • Promote platform 403490 to dev (#459)
  • Promote platform 403496 to dev (#460)
  • Promote platform 403550 to dev (#467)
  • Promote platform 403575 to dev (#474)
  • Promote platform 403618 to dev (#482)
  • Promote platform build 403726 to 9.2.1 (#497)
  • added FACILITIES.properties secret (#504)
  • agent deployment customization using FacilitiesWorkspace CR (#491)
  • promoting platform DEV_403838 build to 9.2.2 (#534)

Bug Fixes and Security Updates¶

  • Added sort filter in GS1 and US1 env vars for DWF Agents (#191)
  • Added nopriv serviceAccount for workloads (#189)
  • Added mas-compatability for 9.2 (#207)
  • Added ipFamilies and ipFamilyPolicy in the operator (#202)
  • Correctly configured OCP Routes with certificates and key from cert-manager secrets (#230)
  • Removed the productVersion from the operator (#228)
  • added truststore to datainit (#234)
  • Added Makefile for ibm-mas-facilities operator build (#250)
  • Updated README.md with SPS build status (#254)
  • Added 9.2 Release Build Status and Branches in README.md (#259)
  • Added empty molecule-test target in Makefile (#265)
  • added new NOTICES and NON_IBM_LICENSE (#271)
  • added new codeowner (#274)
  • Add AWSPCA support for certificate creation (#284)
  • datainit now uses MAS base image (#297)
  • Change home mount paths for all PVCs (#84)
  • Added flag in FacilitiesWorkspace CRD for automated app OM Package installation (#330)
  • operator feature channel readiness (#335)
  • Added separate internal cert for appserver (#367)
  • increased memory request to 1.5Gi (#375)
  • Passed Manage service host and port to all platform pods (#371)
  • MASREF-3964: changing the license file for Q4 fc (#397)
  • Fixed the extra space in Appserver Cert (#398)
  • promoting platform build 403373 for FC (#416)
  • Change mas-utils to fix kubernetes issue (#415)
  • Added scanSettings to whitesource (#419)
  • promote platform build 403411 (#429)
  • Removed unused packages (#426)
  • Change the metadata label to exclude the image from Kyverno’s digest validation (#447)
  • Added PBR support to Facilities (#359)
  • Fixed extra space in certificate dnsNames (#457)
  • Remove usersync related resources (#458)
  • added timezone configuration in CRD (#469)
  • Fixed the pod-specific and agents routes (#475)
  • pass OPERATOR_VERSION to platform pods for displaying on UI (#473)
  • Change Manage service URL based on routing Mode (#465)
  • Fixed the incorrect syntax added in FRONT_END_SERVER for agents (#483)
  • Added Appserver certificate in SAN (#484)
  • Added no_log: true for route creation task (#488)
  • Generate CRD schemas configmap (#492)
  • disabled stable as preview branch (#494)
  • Modified network policies to remediate security vulnerabilities. (#485)
  • Add Support for Issuer and Essential Role Installation [MASR-7516] (#508)
  • reverted appType labels on PVCs (#519)
  • ansible-operator update to 9.3.4 (#520)
  • oidc will use internal svc endpoints (#521)
  • added property COOKIE_SAME_SITE (#523)
  • added manage appId to manageBaseServiceURL (#526)
  • added MAS_WORKSPACE_ID env var to platform pods (#525)
  • fixed port location for manageBaseServiceURL (#527)
  • added PBR support to initial OIDC registration (#529)
  • Sanitize settings.deployment.agentsSpecs (#528)
  • add no_log for sensitive tasks for facilities-properties (#531)
  • Added metadata labels to fix kyerno policy exception (#532)
  • Added missing labels in spec for kyverno policies (#535)
  • corrected notifications.mail.smtp.ssl.checkserveridentity property inside facilities properties (#537)
  • Added topologySpreadConstraints for platform pods (#541)
  • updated license files (#544)
  • added error handling when agentsSpecs is not defined (#545)
  • Change compatability version (#546)
  • promoting latest build 9200003 (#547)

Install Modes¶

Mode Supported
OwnNamespace True
SingleNamespace True
MultiNamespace False
AllNamespaces False

Service Accounts¶

  • ibm-mas-facilities-entitymgr-ws
  • ibm-mas-facilities-nopriv

Cluster Permissions¶

No cluster permissions

Namespace Permissions¶

Group Resource Verbs
"" secrets create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" services create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" services/finalizers create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" pods create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" pods/exec create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" pods/log create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" configmaps create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" endpoints create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" persistentvolumeclaims create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" events create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
"" serviceaccounts create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
route.openshift.io routes create, delete, deletecollection, get, list, patch, update, watch
route.openshift.io routes/custom-host create
route.openshift.io routes/status get, list, update, watch
apps deployments create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps daemonsets create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps replicasets create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps statefulsets create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps.mas.ibm.com facilitiesapps create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps.mas.ibm.com facilitiesapps/status create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps.mas.ibm.com facilitiesapps/finalizers create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps.mas.ibm.com facilitiesworkspaces create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps.mas.ibm.com facilitiesworkspaces/status create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
apps.mas.ibm.com facilitiesworkspaces/finalizers create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
rbac.authorization.k8s.io roles create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
rbac.authorization.k8s.io rolebindings create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
networking.k8s.io networkpolicies create, delete, deletecollection, get, list, patch, update, watch
cert-manager.io certificates create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
cert-manager.io issuers create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
truststore-mgr.ibm.com truststores create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
truststore-mgr.ibm.com truststores/status get
binding.operators.coreos.com servicebindings create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
coordination.k8s.io leases create, delete, get, list, patch, update, watch
